description_long: This sculpture features a reclining human figure, rendered in a classical style and set in relief against a roughly octagonal, textured slab. The figure appears to be nude, with one arm bent behind the head and the other resting across the torso, while the legs are bent and positioned in a relaxed, naturalistic pose. The surface of the sculpture is matte and slightly rough, with visible chisel marks and subtle shading that accentuates the anatomical details. The slab backing the figure is irregularly edged, giving the piece a hand-hewn, artisanal quality. The overall coloration is a muted grayish-white, reminiscent of weathered stone or plaster. The sculpture is likely intended for wall mounting, as the relief is shallow and the back is flat.
description: A classical-style relief sculpture of a reclining nude human figure on a roughly octagonal slab, with a matte, stone-like finish and visible chisel marks.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full figure in relief, with the head, torso, and bent limbs clearly visible against the slab.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shallow depth of the relief and the flatness of the backing slab.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the back and legs of the figure, as well as the irregular edges of the slab.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the figure and the thickness of the slab.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
